subject: Action Required: Complete Your Pre-Visit Forms Before Tomorrow
preview: Your appointment is tomorrow at 9:15 AM. Complete your intake and verify insurance now.
body_html:
Dear Patient,

Your appointment at Cleveland Clinic is scheduled for tomorrow morning. To avoid delays at check-in, please complete your pre-visit intake, identity verification, and insurance review now.

Complete Intake Forms

This request expires tonight if your intake packet is incomplete.

Sent by Cleveland Clinic MyChart Notifications
